prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年安徽大学在海南省综合类最低录取位次分别为约3990名、4018名、4829名、3845名、5051名，整体呈波动后移趋势。2025年位次较2024年后移约1200 名，为近五年最大降幅，与当年大幅扩招（40人→60人）直接相关；2025年基准位次约5051名；该校在海南招生计划2021–2024年均为40人，2025年扩至60人；20 26年计划维持60人，与2025年持平。计划不再扩大，扩招带来的位次下行压力有所缓解，但竞争基数已扩大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 安徽大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年持续下滑：2021年第90名→2022年第95名→2023年第104名→2024年第95名→2025年第98名→2026年第101名，整体处于中下游211水平，排名下行趋势对报考吸 引力有一定削弱；2023年高考周期内声誉评价为"偏负面"，涉及师德师风事件；2026年声誉文件中未收录该校，抖音热度排名第84位、评价"一般"，短视频平台 曝光量偏低，整体报考关注度不高；第五轮学科评估中安徽大学无A-及以上等级学科，学科实力在211高校中相对一般，缺乏顶尖学科对高分考生的强吸引力。 该校在海南招生的电气工程及其自动化、软件工程、通信工程等工科专业社会热度较高（高热推荐/推荐），法学、汉语言文学热度偏热，新闻传播学类、 工商管理类（市场营销、人力资源管理、旅游管理）则属明显劝退方向。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 安徽大学位于安徽省合肥市，距海南较远，跨省报考地域偏好一般；该校在海南招生计划占比较小（60人），属省外普通招生规模；海南省2026年普通高考考生总数约78000人（较2025年67408人增长约15.7%），综合类考生占比接近100% ，考生规模大幅增加，竞争加剧，无明显波动。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移的基准、2026年招生计划持平、海南省考生总数显著增加（约+15.7%） 、学校软科排名持续下滑及声誉热度一般等因素，预计2026年安徽大学在海南省综合类最低录取位次在5051名基础上继续小幅后移。预测最低位次约5131名，区间4931–5331名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约5131名，区间4931–5331名。建议位次在区间内考生以二档专业为主力填报（智能制造工程、网络工程、汉语言文学、经济学、数学类），位次优于区间下限（4931名 以内）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业（电气工程及其自动化、软件工程、通信工程、法学）；位次接近区间上限（5331名附近）应以三档专业保底，优先选择汉语国际教育、行政管理 等相对稳妥方向，避开明显劝退专业（新闻传播学类、市场营销、旅游管理）。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Anhui University in Hainan Province's comprehensive category were approximately 3990, 4018, 4829, 3845, and 5051 respectively, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. The 2025 ranking shifted backward by about 1200 places compared to 2024, the largest decline in five years, directly related to the significant enrollment expansion that year (40 to 60 students). The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 5051. The university's enrollment plan in Hainan was 40 students from 2021 to 2024, expanded to 60 in 2025, and remains at 60 for 2026, unchanged from 2025. With no further expansion, the downward pressure on rankings from the expansion has eased, but the competition base has already expanded.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Anhui University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has been declining in recent years: 90th in 2021, 95th in 2022, 104th in 2023, 95th in 2024, 98th in 2025, and 101st in 2026, placing it at a mid-to-lower level among 211 universities. This downward trend somewhat weakens its appeal to applicants. During the 2023 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation was 'somewhat negative,' involving incidents related to teacher ethics. In 2026, the reputation document did not include the university; its Douyin popularity ranking was 84th with a 'fair' evaluation, indicating low exposure on short video platforms and overall low application attention. In the fifth round of discipline evaluations, Anhui University had no disciplines rated A- or above, making its academic strength relatively average among 211 universities, lacking top disciplines to strongly attract high-scoring students. The university's engineering majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation, Software Engineering, and Communication Engineering, which are offered in Hainan, have high social popularity (highly recommended/recommended), while Law and Chinese Language and Literature are moderately popular. Journalism and Communication, and Business Administration (Marketing, Human Resource Management, Tourism Management) are clearly discouraged directions.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Anhui University is located in Hefei, Anhui Province, far from Hainan, so cross-provincial application regional preference is generally average. Its enrollment plan in Hainan accounts for a small proportion (60 students), representing a normal scale for out-of-province admissions. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in Hainan Province is approximately 78,000 (an increase of about 15.7% from 67,408 in 2025), with comprehensive category candidates accounting for nearly 100%. The significant increase in candidate numbers intensifies competition, with no obvious fluctuations.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward shift in 2025 rankings as a baseline, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the notable increase in total candidates in Hainan Province (approximately +15.7%), the continuous decline in Soft Science rankings, and generally average reputation and popularity, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for Anhui University in Hainan's comprehensive category in 2026 will continue to shift slightly backward from the 5051 baseline. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 5131, with a range of 4931 to 5331.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation
- Software Engineering
- Communication Engineering
- Law
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Intelligent Manufacturing Engineering
- Network Engineering
- Chinese Language and Literature
- Economics
- Mathematics (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science)
- Internet Finance
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Chinese International Education
- Philosophy
- Sociology (including Sociology, Social Work)
- Journalism and Communication (including Journalism, Radio and Television, Editing and Publishing, Network and New Media)
- Marketing
- Human Resource Management
- Administrative Management
- Tourism Management
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is approximately 5131, with a range of 4931 to 5331. Candidates within this range are advised to primarily fill in Tier 2 majors (Intelligent Manufacturing Engineering, Network Engineering, Chinese Language and Literature, Economics, Mathematics). Those with rankings better than the lower limit (within 4931) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Electrical Engineering and Automation, Software Engineering, Communication Engineering, Law). Candidates with rankings near the upper limit (around 5331) should use Tier 3 majors as safety choices, prioritizing relatively stable directions such as Chinese International Education and Administrative Management, while avoiding clearly discouraged majors (Journalism and Communication, Marketing, Tourism Management).
